scope: OMX operational env governance for CH-291 / Chris-Hermes local operation. Value-free: key names and source references only.

bwsProject.note: This ledger records governance scope only. It does not assert raw values exist and must not be used to read, print, infer, or import secret values.

entries.operationalScope: Codex/OMX home directory selection for config and auth-store discovery; value is a path, not a credential.
Hermes profile home observed by OMX adapter for runtime evidence files.
Override path for external Hermes source/runtime root inspected by OMX adapter.
Hermes bootstrap-mode marker used only to alter adapter guidance text.
Optional OMX Discord bot notification credential.
Discord channel identifier paired with the optional bot notification credential.
entries.bwsStatus: not-applicable unless local policy treats channel IDs as sensitive metadata

entries.operationalScope: Optional OMX Discord webhook notification credential.
Optional Discord mention metadata for notification messages.
entries.bwsStatus: not-applicable unless local policy treats mention IDs as sensitive metadata

entries.bwsStatus: not-applicable unless local policy treats chat IDs as sensitive metadata

entries.operationalScope: Legacy/alternate Telegram chat identifier for notifications.
entries.bwsStatus: not-applicable unless local policy treats chat IDs as sensitive metadata

entries.operationalScope: Legacy/alternate Telegram recipient identifier for notifications.
entries.bwsStatus: not-applicable unless local policy treats recipient IDs as sensitive metadata

entries.operationalScope: Optional OMX Slack webhook notification credential.
Optional Slack mention metadata for notification messages.

entries.operationalScope: Notification profile selector for operator-local notification routing.
Notification verbosity selector.
Optional path to notification hook template config; file contents are outside this env ledger.
Operator-controlled enablement flag for reply listener behavior.
Authorized Discord user ID allowlist for reply listener behavior.
entries.bwsStatus: not-applicable unless local policy treats user IDs as sensitive metadata

entries.operationalScope: Reply listener polling interval tuning.
Reply listener rate-limit tuning.
Reply listener prefix-formatting toggle.

excludedHighSignalRefs.exclusionReason: GitHub Actions release-note API credential; governed by CI provider, not Chris/Hermes operation.
npm publish token injected by release workflow; governed by CI provider, not Chris/Hermes operation.
